title: Precision Today - Schedule Pro Update
description:
Hi, seeking help if we can please add this to their site. Please do let us know if we need anything else from the client. 
https://precisiontoday.com/

I have included the steps they sent below:
 
Installation Steps
1. Add the Scheduler on your page
Copy/paste the following script in your <body /> - This will give you access to the _scheduler object.
Note: You can add data-auto-open="true" to this script to automatically open the scheduler on page load.
<script
  data-api-key="ivltqu7dudi4k9qehhv23l6d"
  data-schedulerid="sched_fxcnklb2tfrwxaoonatr3sys"
  defer
  id="se-widget-embed"
  src="https://embed.scheduler.servicetitan.com/scheduler-v1.js"
></script>
 
2. Activate your CTA (Call-to-Action)
You can use two different methods to call the scheduler on your site with a button. Note that positioning and styling of the button is up to you and/or your team; these instructions provide an example of a generic CTA and how to code it.
 
A. Copy and paste the following <button> onto your page and position/style as needed. You can use an existing button as long as it has the onclick attribute below added to the code.
<button 
  onclick="_scheduler.show({ schedulerId: 'sched_fxcnklb2tfrwxaoonatr3sys' })"
  type="button"
> 
  Book Now!
</button>
 
B. Apply the se-booking-show class to any HTML element on your web page and position/style as needed. You can use an existing button as long as it has the class attribute below added to the code.
Please note that this method will only call the default scheduler on your account. If you are creating multiple schedulers for different pages/uses, we recommend using option A to call a specific scheduler.
<button class="se-booking-show" type="button">
  Book Now!
</button>
 
3. Publish your site and you should now be able to access Scheduling Pro from your page by clicking your CTA or accessing with a direct link. 


Thanks much!

title: Precision Today content strategy...
description:
John, can you address this on Monday please?

-------------

Hi John,

I hope you're having a great week.
 
In our last meeting, we discussed some examples of technical issues on the Precision Today website—like the Kitchen Repair page having no content and the Aurora Water Heaters page being orphaned. These were just a few instances that seemed to point to more widespread issues across the site.
 
Could you share an update on what’s being done to address these problems? If there’s a roadmap or priority list in place, we’d appreciate it if you could pass that along.
 
Thanks so much, John—really appreciate your help.
 
Warmly,
Eric C.

title: Update BBB content
description:
Hi,

This is inline with the task: Blog post writing for Precision Today's 25 Year BBB Anniversary - J304 Precision Today

The client has some text/blurbs they want to added to the “Our Legacy of Honest, Reliable Service” section. Thanks much!
Page: https://precisiontoday.com/blog/celebrating-25-years-of-bbb-accreditation/


Living Our Values Every Day
At Precision Today, our 25-year BBB accreditation reflects how we embody the values that matter most:

Character in Action - We demonstrate our core values through transparent communication and follow-through. Every service call, every interaction, and every decision reflects our commitment to doing what's right, not just what's easy. Our technicians arrive on time, provide honest assessments, and stand behind their work with our money-back guarantee.

A Culture of Trust - Our clear mission to provide exceptional home comfort services empowers our team to make decisions that benefit our customers. We invest in ongoing training and certification for our technicians, creating opportunities for their professional growth while ensuring our customers receive the most knowledgeable service possible.

Customer Relationships First - Our internal standards go beyond fixing problems; we focus on building lasting relationships. From our same-day service availability to our no-surprise pricing, every practice is designed to strengthen trust. We listen to feedback, respond promptly to concerns, and treat every home as if it were our own.

Community Partnership - For over 30 years, we've given back to Chicagoland through local initiatives, charitable donations, and volunteer work. Whether supporting local schools, participating in community events, or helping neighbors in need, we believe our success is measured by the positive impact we make beyond the service call.

title: Site branding update
description:
Email subject: Re: Precision Today Rebrand Coming

Heather requested some brand updates to the site, we are waiting on HEX color codes. If these are not received soon I will pull the colors as close as I can and send through.

Thank you for these, Heather! I see the mascot, background, logo, and van images are all there.

The last item we need is the HEX codes for the dark orange, light orange, and dark gray. Could you send those over when you have a chance? We'd like to send all the updates to the developers as a package if we can.

The updates I have noted are:
  • Update hero background on the homepage and service pages to the orange burst (homepage may have a conflict with the form)
  • Place the mascot on the service page hero section instead of the van
  • Replace van images
  • Replace mascot images
  • Remove dog graphic on the homepage
  • Update the HEX codes of the orange and gray
  • Change the blue buttons out for the light orange color

title: Update Gemstone lights logo
assignees: Bogdan Zakharchyshyn, Den, Jordan, Predrag, Venus Saragena
description:
Seeking help with the client request below:

Please use the code below for us to the authorized dealer logo for Gemstone to the Precision website.
 

Instructions for Adding Gemstone Lights Authorized Dealer Badge


Hello,
You've been requested by ( Precision Today ) to add the Gemstone Lights Verified Dealer Badge to their website. Below are the step-by-step instructions to integrate the badge into the dealer’s website.

Instructions:
1. Identify the Page to Add the Badge
Place the badge on the homepage or a specific page where the dealer wants to showcase their partnership with Gemstone Lights.

2. Add the Following HTML Code
Insert the HTML code snippet below into the website, ideally in a section where it can be easily seen (like the footer, sidebar, or header).

<!-- Gemstone Lights Verified Dealer Badge Start --><div id="GemstoneDealerBadge" data-dealer-id="110918">    <a href="https://www.gemstonelights.com/ref/precision-today/" target="_blank" title="Verify us on Gemstone Lights official website">        <img decoding="async" src="https://verify.gemstonelights.com/images/authorized.webp" width="362" loading="lazy" alt="Verified Dealer Badge"/>    </a></div><script src="https://verify.gemstonelights.com/badge.min.js" defer></script><!-- Gemstone Lights Verified Dealer Badge End -->

The code above has the correct dealer reference URL, so you do not need to modify the code.

3. Test the Integration
After adding the badge, make sure the badge loads properly on both desktop and mobile devices.

Important Note:
Remember, the badge will only load on an approved dealer's website. Please ensure that the dealer’s website link is correctly updated in their Gemstone Lights dealership account. If the link is not updated, the badge will not display properly.

4. Contact Us for Support
If you encounter any issues during the integration, feel free to reach out to us at raaz@gemstonelights.com, and we'll be happy to assist you.

By following the steps above, you will successfully integrate the Gemstone Lights Authorized Dealer Badge into the website.

Thank you for your help in supporting our authorized dealer network.
2 places where they want it:
  • To replace the one on the Gemstone page.
  • To add it to the line of logos at the bottom of the home page. 

Please let me know you need anything else from the client so we can send them the info. 

Thanks much!

title: Leads and Revenue Loss Concerns
description:
Hi seeking help w/ an email we got from Eric please. 

He was asking if we can check the site as soon as possible. I have included the verbatim of the email below:
 
Hi team,

I'm reviewing Precision Today's November performance and noticed a few things I wanted to flag.

In Google Search Console, we're seeing impressions up 167% YoY and average position improved significantly (48.5 → 19.1), but clicks are down 13% and CTR dropped from 0.8% to 0.3%. More visibility, better rankings, fewer clicks.

On the local side, the grids had been trending in the right direction, but we're now suddenly seeing signs of decline.

This has translated to real revenue loss for the business, so we're trying to get to the bottom of it.

Can you take a look and share what you're seeing on your end as soon as possible, please?

I should have noted we’re seeing a similar pattern with the website. December MTD shows SEO/Direct leads down 44% YoY, with booking rate down 21%.

CC  

*I have also CC'd both of you on the email for reference and if ever a direct reply to them is needed. 

 Thanks much!

title: Precision Today Grayslake GBP underperforming, may be related to the Miller’s site into a 3-page ...
assignees: Alina Neamtu, Anamaria Avram, Andrei Pocol, Clayton Coombs, Dorin Gherman, John De Guzman, Mikey King, Ovidiu Dita
description:
Hi, seeking help investigate what happened to their Grayslake GBP. 

This is inline with the email Eric sent to us. Initialy he asked when the old https://www.millersareaheating.com/ site was swithced to a mini-site. Confirmed with Dev team it was done last Oct. 2nd, 2024 (Question about https://www.millersareaheating.com/ mini-site - J304 Precision Today).

Eric then had a follow up info about their query. I have included the verbatim he sent via the email:
Hoping the team might be able to help us dig into this a bit further. Here’s what we’ve seen so far.
 
The Precision Today Grayslake GBP has been underperforming for a while now. Looking back, there was a significant drop in performance between September and November 2024. That timing lines up with when we converted the Miller’s site into a 3-page mini-site, which looks like a likely cause.
 
I haven’t been able to locate the original 301 redirect plan. Do you happen to have that on hand? And if so, are you able to confirm whether the redirects are working as intended?
 
We're trying to figure out our next steps — whether we should drop that mini-site entirely or go back and build it back up. Any help or insight you can offer would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks much!

CC

title: Add current monthly budgets (dollar & words amounts) to Project Register
description:
These will be found in the signed proposal (contract) you uploaded earlier to the CONTRACT DOCS folder in the Client Folder. If they're not there then this is not currently being used:

  1. Column X - Contract Amount (WEBDEV) - Get this from the signed proposal uploaded to the CONTRACT DOCS in Client folder. This is used in Website Development projects only.
  2. Column Y - LSA Management Fee  - not currently used
  3. Column Z - SmartAds Management Fee - not currently used
  4. Column AA - SmartAds Budget - not currently used
  5. Column AB - Current Monthly Contract Amount ($) - Get this from the signed proposal uploaded to the CONTRACT DOCS in Client folder. This is used for Unfair Advantage SEO projects only.
  6. Column  AC - Current Supplementary Budget ($) - not currently used
  7. Column AD - Current monthly link budget ($) - not currently used
  8. Column AE - Current monthly content budget ($) - not currently used
  9. Column AF - Current monthly content budget (words) - Get this from the signed proposal uploaded to the CONTRACT DOCS in Client folder. Used in Unfair Advantage SEO projects only.

title: Set regular agreed progress call dates in calendar and send to all participants

  2. Client Folder - Column AM

title: Edit Client Workbook to add new client data from Project Register
Grab signed proposal from Basecamp Sales project and upload to CONTRACT DOCS folder in Google Dri...
description:
SALES Basecamp project > New Clients...

New Clients - Sales

title: Raise Project number in Project Register
description:
1. Change column A from Inactive to Active

  2. Change column E from Active to Inactive

  3. Add entry to column B:
    3.1 Copy Enquiry Number from column E and 'paste special'>'values only' into column B
    3.2 Remove "E" prefix and replace with:
         J, if operation (has no agreed end date, SEO, LSA etc.)
         P, if project (has agreed end date, website development etc.)
         3.21 Change box background color:
                      Green: SEO
                      Yellow: LSA
                      Blue: WebDev

  4. Add project start date in column C - Should usually be today's date
         An easy way to do this would be to copy the date from the cell above, double click and choose today's date from the calendar date picker

  5. Select the cell above in column D and pull the handle down.
         This will automatically add the correct project title column D. This is what you use for the project number in the project doc titles

title: Check all required fields in Enquiry form are complete
Add Client Workbook & GeoGrids sheets to Basecamp Project
